attributes.source: Derived from Our World in Data broad age groups (World, 2023; UN WPP-based), uniform within each band
UN Population Division (WPP 2024 medium variant, global sex composition)

description.en: Choose the country you currently live in.

attributes.source: World Bank WDI SP.POP.TOTL (2023), mapped to app country list
AABB / international donor screening summaries (approximate global phenotype mix)
Papadatou-Pastou et al., meta-analysis of handedness prevalence
Synthetic global marginal (survey literature; not a census). Brown-dominant prior with wide uncertainty.

description.en: Illustrative world blend of national surveys; true joint distribution depends strongly on ancestry and geography.
description.tr: Ulusal anketlerin dünya çapında birleştirilmiş kabaca karışımı; gerçek dağılım köken ve coğrafyaya göre güçlü şekilde değişir.

attributes.source: Synthetic global marginal (ethnic composition model; not self-reported census).

description.en: Black/dark hair categories dominate globally; light hair is rare outside European-descended populations.
description.tr: Siyah/koyu saç kategorileri küresel olarak baskın; açık renkli saç Avrupa kökenli olmayan nüfuslarda nadirdir.

attributes.source: Global Gaussian cm prior (mean ~165 cm, sd ~11.3; NCD-RisC-informed level, not age-sex conditional)

description.en: Choose your highest completed education level.
description.tr: Tamamladığın en yüksek eğitim düzeyini seç.

attributes.source: UNESCO UIS & World Bank (ISCED-oriented adult attainment, rounded global mix)
UN demographic yearbook / DHS-style aggregates (rough global mix)
WHO Global Report on Tobacco Prevalence (adults, rounded categories)

description.en: Choose the option that best describes your alcohol use.
description.tr: Alkol kullanımını en iyi tanımlayan seçeneği seç.

attributes.source: WHO Global status report on alcohol and health (frequency classes mapped loosely)
Pew Research Center, Global Religious Futures (2020 baseline, rounded)

description.en: Choose the eating pattern that best describes you.
description.tr: Seni en iyi tanımlayan beslenme düzenini seç.

attributes.source: Vegetarianism meta-reviews & FAO food pattern estimates (very uncertain global prior)

label.en: Omnivore (eats both plant and animal foods)

description.en: Select the month you were born.

attributes.source: HMD / national vital statistics seasonal averages (weak global prior)

description.en: Choose the option that best matches your household.
description.tr: Hanen için en uygun seçeneği seç.

attributes.source: Euromonitor / industry reports (household-oriented, mapped to self-report buckets)

description.en: Choose the housing ownership status that best fits you.
description.tr: Sana en uygun konut sahipliği durumunu seç.

attributes.source: UN-Habitat / Eurostat / national housing surveys (rounded global tenure mix)

description.en: Reflects installed smartphone OS share, not people; many individuals own multiple devices.
description.tr: Yüklü akıllı telefon işletim sistemi payını yansıtır, kişi sayısını değil; çoklu cihaz yaygındır.

attributes.source: StatCounter GlobalStats mobile OS (device share, Jan–Dec 2024 average, rounded)

description.en: How do you usually pay for daily purchases?
description.tr: Günlük harcamalarda genelde nasıl ödeme yaparsın?

attributes.source: World Bank Global Findex 2021 (mapped to cash vs card vs mobile digital use)
UNCTAD / e-commerce share of retail (mapped to channel habit buckets)
